insight_events.title: Leadership / governance risk elevated
insight_events.summary: Leadership / governance risk elevated. MongoDB, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDB) CFO Michael Berry reports 21,826-share stock gifts - Stock Titan; MongoDB (MDB) CEO has shares withheld to cover RSU tax bill - Stock Titan
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change confidence in management alignment, oversight, or execution.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Check transaction context, trading plans, and whether the pattern is unusual for this issuer.

insight_events.title: Net income accelerating
insight_events.summary: Net income growth moved from +79.5% to +111.8% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Growth regime upshift
insight_events.summary: Growth regime upshift: YoY growth moved to +13.7% to +111.8% YoY (baseline median -19.5% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.
